creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
The graphics/lcms2 port was updated to 2.10 on 4 June.  Trying to upgrade my port on 7 June I get this:

    => Attempting to fetch https://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/lcms/lcms/2.10/lcms2-2.10.tar.gz
    fetch: https://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/lcms/lcms/2.10/lcms2-2.10.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 15763062, actual 15763103

This happens for all the other sourceforge URLs until it hits a site that has the right file size, the one at http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/sunpoet/lcms2-2.10.tar.gz.

I find the sha256 in the distinfo file is also incorrect for the tarball currently avaialble on the main download sites:

    > wget https://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/lcms/lcms/2.10/lcms2-2.10.tar.gz
    > ls -l lcms2-2.10.tar.gz
    -rw-------  1 xxxx  xxxx  15763103 Jun  5 13:36 lcms2-2.10.tar.gz
    > sha256 lcms2-2.10.tar.gz
    SHA256 (lcms2-2.10.tar.gz) = 50d411fd494c7c6973866e08c05dea83245d7e23a0db6237a9d00f88b2e0f346
